title: Dynamic Trees - Terralith
description: Compatibility Mod between Dynamic trees and Terralith
body: ![Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/975/393/terralith.png) [![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/0Prkr13.png)](https://discord.gg/A4FCBS3) [![Forge](https://i.imgur.com/oeSBh9T.png)](https://files.minecraftforge.net) ## Overview This mod makes Terralith compatible with Dynamic Trees, adding dynamically growing trees to its biomes during world generation. The trees, their behavior and their generation can be customized and tweaked through the use of Tree Packs. ## Features ### World Generation All terralith biomes generate with custom trees, too many to list! here are a few examples of how the biomes will now look: And many many more! ## Other addons Addons for other mods can be found in the [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) page. ### Suggestions and Requests To request a new mod for compatibility please do it [Github Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/DynamicTreesTeam/discussions/categories/compatibility-addon-suggestions). ## Requirements - [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) - [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) - Optionally, [Dynamic Trees Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) ## License, Permission and Modpacks Permission is hereby granted to use this mod in ANY mod pack or server. Please don't ask for permission to You can use this in any mod pack you'd like! No need to ask. This mod has an MIT license and its source is public on github.
